untranslatable_reason: Signal requires quantitative inputs (EPS growth > 10%, P/E < 25) and qualitative assessment (market expansion, addressable market potential) that are not available in the allowed indicator set. Only technical indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, etc.) are supported. Fundamental metrics (EPS growth YoY, P/E ratio) and market saturation analysis require external data sources outside the backtesting engine's scope.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate using momentum (price > sma_20) and trend confirmation (price > sma_50) as proxies for the high-growth/expanding-market context, but this fundamentally misses the core rule which is equity-selection based on earnings growth and valuation multiples. A proper implementation would require a pre-filter or external data pipeline for EPS and P/E screening before technical conditions are applied.
